title: Moar TCon
description: More materials and tools in Tinkers Construct, that simple.
body:
I will not post recipes. Use JEI.

 

This mod adds new materials. That's pretty much it. All materials' ores will have information on where they spawn through JEI. A lot of the resources in this mod are extremely rare, so expect to not find some initially. Unique toolparts are toolparts that you craft using different types of crafting stations rather than the material + stencil method. Use JEI for their recipe

 
 

All port questions will be ignored.

 - No I do not plan to port to fabric. Reasoning here is that I do not want to rewrite the mod.
 - No I do not plan to port to X.X.X. Reasoning here is that I do not want to rewrite the mod.
 - No I will not allow you to do it either. Reasoning here is that I do not want to have forks that have people coming to me for support.
 

The only person that is allowed to reupload my mod is Eastonium because I'm part of his WASD Build Team.
